title: FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL MYRTLE CREEK FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency aid to help pay electricity, natural gas, heating fuel and prescriptions when funding is available. Utility assistance is limited to the last $50 of the bill and cannot provide deposits for service connection. Prescription assistance depends on the type of medication. 116 N Main Street Myrtle Creek, OR 97457 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday/Wednesday 9am-1pm (541) 863-5489 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 863-5489 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by service AREA SERVED: Towns of Azalea, Canyonville, Day's Creek, Glendale & Myrtle Creek Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Prescription Expense Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL MYRTLE CREEK
